Acolyte of Umordhoth (50039) has no Hunter keyword (only 'Prey - fewest cards in hand'), but it moved on its own during enemy phases: R10 it moved Cellar->Hallway toward me after I had evaded/disengaged it, and R11 it moved Hallway->Parlor. Non-Hunter enemies should not move during the enemy phase. If the Return-Gathering Acolyte is meant to be a Hunter, its printed text/keywords may be missing Hunter; if it is not a Hunter, the self-movement is a bug.
